ReviewsWidget.title: What do buyers think of their plans 2 months after purchase?

home.title: Workout Plan | Musclepals
home.description: Create a workout plan tailored to you. Short quiz, results in minutes.

workout.title: Professional Workout Plan - Personalized for You
workout.description: Looking for an effective exercise routine? I'll prepare a set based on your answers.

workoutForm.title: Plan Form | Musclepals
workoutForm.description: Answer the questions to tailor the plan to your goals.

WorkoutPage.description: Complete a short survey, and I'll create the perfect workout plan for you! It will take you 2-3 minutes.

bulk.label: I want to bulk
bulk.alt: I want to build muscle mass
bulk.description: You focus on building new muscle mass, weight increases.

cut.label: I want to cut
cut.description: You lose weight, burn fat, and reveal existing muscle.

Bodyfat.title:
Select your
body fat level
Bodyfat.alt: Physique for selected body fat level

stepsDataMale.info: Extremely low body fat. Very muscular physique with excellent definition.
Very low body fat. Lean physique, muscles are clearly visible.
Healthy, athletic body fat level. Muscles are visible but not overly shredded.
Low to average body fat. Physique is lean, some muscle visibility.
Moderate body fat. Physique is fuller, less muscle definition.
Higher body fat level. Physique is rounded, muscles are not visible.
High body fat level. Physique is very rounded.
Very high body fat level. Physique is obese.

stepsDataFemale.info: Very low body fat, typical for physique competitors. May be linked to hormonal issues.
Low body fat, often seen in active women and athletes. Very lean with defined muscles.
Healthy, athletic level. Lean but feminine. Most common in active women.
Average body fat level. Natural look, slightly rounded, without distinct definition.
Elevated body fat. Clearly rounded physique, possible health concerns.
Very high body fat. Health consultation and lifestyle change recommended.

Weight.error2: Please enter a target weight between 30-300kg.
Weight.errorBulk: If your goal is to bulk, your target weight must be higher than current.
Weight.errorCut: If your goal is to cut, your target weight must be lower than current.

12-14.description: It's the best time to build solid foundations! Your body is developing, so habits and technique are key, not heavy weights.

15-20.message: Perfect age to get serious about training!
15-20.description: Your body recovers quickly, so you can make great progress with well-planned exercises and nutrition.

21-30.message: This is the time to build your best shape!
21-30.description: You already know your body - now you just need a tailored plan to take your results to the next level.

Activity.title: What is your physical activity level?
Activity.errorMsg: Please select one option before proceeding.

options.some_activity: Moving a bit, but no regular workouts. 🚶
options.light_training: Light training a few times a week. 🏃‍♂️
options.hard_work: Intense training or heavy physical job. 🏋️‍♂️

description.starvation: The body is severely weakened due to extreme weight deficit.
description.emaciation: Body is noticeably weakened; muscles and tissues lack sufficient nutrition.
description.underweight: Body weight is too low. Immunity may be lower and physical effort harder to sustain.
description.normal: The body is neither burdened by excess fat nor weakened by a deficit.
description.overweight: Excess body fat is appearing, starting to burden the body.
description.obesityI: Excess body fat clearly burdens the body and increases disease risk.
description.obesityII: Body is heavily burdened. Risk of serious chronic diseases increases.
description.obesityIII: Very high amount of body fat poses a serious threat to health and life.

gym.label: I will train at the gym
gym.label_f: I will train at the gym
gym.alt: I will train at the gym
gym.alt_f: I will train at the gym
gym.description: Gym workout with access to a wide range of equipment.
gym.description_f: Gym workout with access to a wide range of equipment.

home.label: I will train at home
home.description: Home workout adaptable to available equipment.
home.description_f: Home workout adaptable to available equipment.

bandsPanel.question: Do you have access to resistance bands?

Experience.title:
What is your
training experience?

none.label: I haven't started training yet. 🐣
none.description1: At the start, learning proper technique and building consistency is key.
none.description2:
But don't worry!
Your Plan will guide you step by step ;)

just_started.label: I just started. 🏁
just_started.description2: Your body responds quickly at this stage, so we'll focus on learning technique and simple, repeatable habits.

some_experience.label: I've been training a bit. 💪
some_experience.description2: This is when the body gets used to training — so introducing a plan with structure and progression is vital.

advanced.label: I've been training for a long time. 🥇
advanced.description1: Great job! You know what consistency and dedication look like.
advanced.description2: At this stage, we focus on optimization: precise planning, progression, and recovery.

Experience.errorMsg: Please select your training experience before proceeding.

Equipment.title: What equipment do you have at home?
Equipment.subtitle: (you can select more than one)

none.label: I have no equipment. 🚫
none.description: We'll base the plan on bodyweight exercises and simple household items.

bands.label: Resistance bands.
bands.description: Mini bands and power bands allow us to add resistance and scale difficulty.

dumbbells.label: Dumbbells.
dumbbells.description: We'll use single and double-arm variations to maximize dumbbell potential.

barbell.label: Barbell and weights.
barbell.description: We'll set up classic lifts (squats, deadlifts, presses) matching volume to your goal.

bench.label: Bench press bench.
bench.description: A bench allows for lying and incline exercises to better target muscles.

pullup_bar.label: Pull-up bar.
pullup_bar.description: Allows for pull-ups and other calisthenic exercises.

dip_bar.label: Dip bars.
dip_bar.description: Bars enable dips and other tricep-focused movements.

Equipment.errorMsg: Select at least one equipment option to proceed.

difficulty regarding the gym?

options.motivation: I lack motivation to train/keep a diet. 😔
options.effects: I'm discouraged by not seeing results. ⏳
options.insecurity: I'm afraid/insecure about going to the gym. 😟
options.diet: I don't really know how to handle the diet. ❓
options.no_difficulty: I don't have any of the above difficulties. ✅

Sleep.title:
How much time do you
spend sleeping?
messages: Hard to recover well with this amount of sleep... Remember to work on it :)
Good amount of sleep — recovery supports training and health.
Very good amount of sleep — optimal recovery.
Too much sleep might mean irregularity — monitor how you feel.

DurationStep.info: Optimal workout time is 45-60 minutes. Remember, set quality matters more than quantity.

ResultPage.title:
Your Workout Plan
is ready!
ResultPage.intro1:
Created based on
Your 14 answers by an
advanced training algorithm
designed specifically for
building physique and fat loss.
ResultPage.intro2:
You will receive an individual data-driven plan
generated in less than 3 minutes
thanks to technology that analyzes over
4,000 training combinations.
ResultPage.subtitle:
Quick Summary
of your results
ResultPage.conclusion1: And then selects a specific workout plan that fits your situation better than 99% of cookie-cutter plans online.
ResultPage.conclusion2: It's a mix of personal trainer knowledge and system precision that doesn't make mistakes or guess.
ResultPage.purchaseTitle: What exactly do you get after purchase?
